hero.tagline: I'm Andrea — a senior direct response copywriter, creative strategist, and SEO specialist with 5 years of experience and over $5M in sales generated to date. I write high-converting copy that turns cold traffic into loyal customers for health, clothing, wellness and DTC brands. As an SEO strategist, I build full-scale strategies for local, national, and multi-location brands — driving rankings, conversions, and scalable growth across service-area businesses and eCommerce catalogs.

projects.title: DTC eCommerce Brands
projects.description: Wrote ad copy, landing pages, and email sequences across top-performing channels for three DTC brands — health & wellness pain relief, boutique men's retail shorts, and high-end skincare. Each required a distinct voice for distinct audiences.
projects.label: Open Category

detail.client: Three DTC eCommerce Brands (US-based, all clients redacted)
detail.overview: Direct-response copywriting and conversion content across three US-based DTC brands — a health & wellness pain relief brand, a men's boutique retail apparel store, and a high-end skincare retailer. Each required a distinctly different voice, funnel architecture, and audience research depth. Client identities and source URLs redacted; sample copywriting is held in a private Drive folder for client confidentiality.

subProjects.title: DTC Health & Wellness Brand
subProjects.imageCaption: Bestseller and testimonial section from the brand site — all wordmarks and customer-name initials redacted.
subProjects.overview: DTC pain relief and compression product line operating in a Meta-ad-restricted health category. Target audience was older adults in chronic pain — meaning copy had to thread a YMYL needle: empathetic to the pain narrative without making medical claims that would trigger ad policy reviews. Funnel mixed cold traffic from paid social (Meta + TikTok) and warm traffic from direct landing pages and email lifecycle. Wrote VSL-style sales copy, advertorial intros, long-form landing pages, and full email sequences (welcome, browse-abandon, cart-abandon, post-purchase, win-back). All work was structured around documented voice-of-customer pulled from review mining and chat logs.
deliverables: Direct-response ad copy across Meta and TikTok (multiple angles tested weekly)
Long-form sales pages and pre-sale advertorials
Email lifecycle flows: welcome, browse-abandon, cart-abandon, post-purchase, win-back
Funnel-stage messaging mapped to Schwartz awareness levels
PDP and landing page rewrites tuned to GA4 conversion data
Meta-policy-aware copy that avoids health claim violations
results: $4.48M total revenue · 2M+ sessions · 66% engagement rate · 34% session conversion rate
Paid Social: $1.10M revenue at 47.69% session conversion rate
subProjects.samplesNote: Sample copywriting is not available on this page — only viewable in the private Drive folder for client confidentiality.

subProjects.title: Men's Retail Store
subProjects.overview: Boutique Australian-style men's chino brand selling into the US market. Brand voice needed to sit between practical (everyday wearable, machine-washable, 100-day guarantee) and aspirational (the look, the fabric, the lifestyle) — without sounding like another generic DTC men's apparel brand. Wrote collection pages, product pages, and supporting content to push qualified browse traffic deeper into the conversion funnel. Focused on bridging the gap between trust signals (free returns, USA shipping, 5-star reviews) and the actual buying decision.
deliverables: Collection page copy across 15+ chino and shorts SKU collections
Product page descriptions optimized for both buyer and crawler
Trust-stack content (size guides, fit guarantees, returns flow)
Email sequences for browse-abandon and post-purchase
Brand voice guide and tone-of-voice documentation
results: Higher engagement and time-on-page on top-converting PDPs
Reduced bounce on category landing pages following rewrite
subProjects.source: Source URL redacted for client confidentiality
subProjects.samplesNote: Live copy and brand guidelines are in the private Drive folder.

subProjects.title: High-End Skincare Retail
subProjects.imageCaption: ALL BRANDS landing page — retailer name and logo redacted.
subProjects.overview: Curated high-end multi-brand skincare retailer. Audience skews older, higher-income, more educated on actives, brands, and rituals. That changed everything about the voice — copy needed to assume product knowledge, lead with formulation and provenance rather than benefit shouting, and treat readers like discerning buyers, not impulse-shoppers. Wrote brand collection pages, product detail copy, and editorial-style category guides supporting a multi-brand retailer model where each brand has its own positioning to honor.
deliverables: Editorial-style brand collection pages (Biologique Recherche, Lenox & Sixteenth, Paume, and others — all redacted)
PDP copy tuned to high-AOV beauty buyer psychology
Ritual and routine content connecting products across brands
Educational content on ingredients and formulation for SEO
Tone calibration per brand to preserve each label's individual voice
results: Distinct voice across 10+ luxury skincare brands within one retailer
Editorial content built to support higher-consideration purchase paths
PDP rewrites aligned with multi-brand merchandising
subProjects.source: Source URL redacted for client confidentiality
subProjects.samplesNote: Brand voice samples and PDP examples are in the private Drive folder.

deliverables: Direct-response ad copy across Meta and TikTok
Long-form sales pages and pre-sale advertorials
Email lifecycle: welcome, browse-abandon, cart-abandon, post-purchase, win-back
Funnel-stage messaging architecture mapped to awareness levels (Schwartz)
Conversion-focused PDP and landing page rewrites
detail.approach: Built copy systems against documented customer voice (review mining + chat log analysis). Stress-tested messaging across awareness levels — problem-aware to solution-aware to product-aware — and structured pages around the most commercially-loaded query intent. Worked in tight feedback loops with paid media and design to optimize hooks weekly based on GA4 conversion data.
detail.samplesNote: Copywriting samples available upon request (redacted to protect client confidentiality).

projects.title: Client Ranking Achievement — Medical Tourism
projects.description: Took over a stalled SEO program post-Helpful Content Update. Restructured keyword map, rebuilt commercial service pages, expanded topical clusters. Organic traffic scaled from ~11K to 50K+ monthly visits in 24 months.
projects.label: Case Study

detail.client: Medical Tourism Client (US-based, client name redacted)
detail.overview: Client is a US-based medical tourism company connecting patients with vetted dental providers overseas. When I took over the SEO direction, the site had plateaued at ~11,000 monthly organic visits and was beginning to decline following the Google Helpful Content Update — despite a consistent publishing cadence and an existing SEO strategy in place.

channels.share: tooth chart · teeth numbers · dental implants cost

deliverables: Root-cause analysis using GSC data to diagnose post-HCU decline
Keyword map rebuilt around real search behavior, not assumed intent
Core service pages reworked to target high-intent commercial terms
Supporting content clusters expanded to strengthen topical authority
Content quality framework aligned to E-E-A-T guidelines
Ongoing optimization for highly-competitive YMYL keywords
detail.approach: I led a full restructuring of the SEO program — rebuilding the keyword map around real search behavior, reworking core service pages to target high-intent commercial terms, and expanding supporting content clusters to strengthen topical authority across the site. The client depends almost entirely on organic traffic through articles following E-E-A-T guidelines, so every content decision was made against that bar.
detail.samplesNote: Performance dashboards and content samples available upon request (client identity redacted to protect confidentiality).

images.caption: Before — Ahrefs Organic Rankings. Client domain redacted. ~6.2K keywords, 16.1K monthly traffic, declining post-HCU.
After — Ahrefs Organic Rankings. Client domain redacted. 11.5K keywords (+85%), 49.9K monthly traffic (+210%) following 24-month restructure.
Top-ranking keywords across high-intent commercial dental terms — tooth chart, teeth numbers, cost of full mouth dental implants.

projects.title: Atlanta OBGYN Clinic — GBP & Multi-Location
projects.description: Local SEO and multi-location strategy for a US OBGYN practice. Authority Score 34, 16.3K organic traffic, 12.8K ranking keywords, 255 referring domains, 44.93% visibility — with AI-search citations across ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, and Gemini.
projects.label: Case Study

detail.client: US OBGYN Clinic (Atlanta-based, client name redacted)
detail.overview: An Atlanta-based OBGYN practice operating across multiple clinic locations. The brand needed full-stack local SEO covering Google Business Profile optimization, multi-location schema, citation consistency, and AI-search visibility — without cannibalization between location pages competing for the same metro queries.
deliverables: Google Business Profile optimization across all clinic locations
Multi-location schema (MedicalBusiness, MedicalSpecialty)
NAP consistency audit and citation cleanup across local directories
Location-specific content built to avoid cannibalization with sibling pages
AI-search optimization for ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, AI Mode, Gemini
Review velocity and Q&A optimization tied to each location
detail.approach: Built a centralized framework for core medical content (E-E-A-T-compliant, author-credentialed) with location-specific signals layered on top — real local testimonials, embedded GBP maps, location-specific photos. AI-search optimization treated as its own discipline: structured FAQ markup, chunk-optimized passages, llms.txt, and first-party expert quotes designed for LLM citation rather than blue-link ranking alone.
detail.source: Source: Semrush SEO Dashboard (composite, last 90 days)
detail.samplesNote: GBP audit deck and location-page samples available upon request (client identity redacted).

experience.summary: Wrote VSLs, advertorials, ad copy, Amazon A+ Content, and funnel-driving direct-response assets for a DTC supplement brand operating in a Meta-ad-restricted health category. Contributed to $10M+ in tracked sales and 22M+ video views.

Led full-funnel SEO programs for US clients across healthcare, finance, SaaS, home services, and legal. Owned keyword strategy, technical SEO, GEO/AEO workflows, content decay audits, and direct stakeholder reporting via Looker Studio.
Managed editorial pipelines across multiple US client accounts. Reviewed writer outputs for E-E-A-T compliance, brand voice, and FTC/YMYL accuracy before delivery.
Wrote SEO-optimized long-form articles, service pages, and category copy for US agency clients across YMYL verticals.
Independent SEO and copywriting engagements for medical tourism, OBGYN, B2B SaaS, and automotive aftermarket brands. Includes the Medical Tourism and OBGYN case studies above.

process.title: From keyword to conversion — the 6-step system

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: VoC interviews, review mining (Amazon, Reddit, G2), competitor teardowns. Semrush MCP runs SERP + gap analysis in parallel.

steps.title: Cluster
steps.description: Keywords clustered by search intent — informational, commercial, transactional, navigational. Volume is secondary.

steps.title: Outline
steps.description: SERP-aligned: PAA coverage, entity checklist, competitor gaps, internal linking targets, schema spec, conversion goal.

steps.title: Write
steps.description: Schwartz awareness/sophistication hook, then Hook-Story-Offer or PAS body. First-party proof stacked throughout.

steps.title: Ship
steps.description: Structured data, internal linking equity, chunk-optimized passages for LLM citation, llms.txt where relevant.

steps.title: Maintain
steps.description: Monthly GSC query analysis, quarterly cannibalization audits, refresh cycles triggered by Core Updates and HCU rollouts.
